question: The chart shows defect rate in production over time (out of a possible 0–10%). What is the most appropriate conclusion about the change shown?

options.A: The defect rate showed only a very small increase over the period
options.B: The defect rate stayed exactly the same throughout the period
options.C: There was a sharp increase in the defect rate over the period
options.D: The trend in the defect rate cannot be determined from this chart

explanation: The y-axis uses a very tight range (2.63–2.70%) instead of a more informative 0–10% context, which visually exaggerates variability. The actual net change is about 0.05% over the period, which is modest in the full context.
